issues.description: Missing condition requirement: effect requires resting 1 DON!! card and this Character as a cost. DSL must include conditions for HasAttachedDon (for DON!! availability) and/or explicit cost modeling.
SearchDeck filter is incomplete. Must specify type filter for {Neptunian} or {Fish-Man Island} types and limit to 'up to 1' card from top 5 of deck, not generic 'Any'.

Missing action: effect requires looking at 5 cards from top of deck and placing rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only models the search portion; does not account for the 'look at 5 / place rest' sequencing.
Trigger 'Activated' is correct for [Activate: Main], but no condition restricting to Main Phase is present in DSL.
